jobs.title: Staff Backend Engineer, GitLab Runner Cloud
jobs.content:
About the role

Own the GitLab Runner Cloud control-plane that powers millions of CI-CD jobs across the all-remote engineering org's distributed-systems infrastructure.

  • Go, Kubernetes, and distributed-systems experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Customer-Success Strategy
jobs.content: Own GitLab's customer-success strategy roadmap across enterprise DevSecOps adoption, education, and community-engagement motion.
